# Repo metadata checklist

GitHub repo metadata (description, website, topics) can't be edited from a local
clone/CLI in this environment — apply these manually in the GitHub UI
(**Settings → General**, and the gear icon next to "About" on the repo homepage).

## Description

```
TypeScript parser combinators that run interpreted, compile to flat JS, and support CSTs, trivia, recovery, and incremental parsing.
```

## Website

```
https://matthew-dean.github.io/parseman/
```
